title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 59.210 - Accounts audited and settled by county commission
text:
59.210.  Accounts audited and settled by county commission. — It shall be the duty of the county commission to audit and settle the accounts of recorders for books purchased for the use of their offices, and allow, in their discretion, such sums as shall be reasonable, to be paid out of the county treasury.
(RSMo 1939 § 13186) 
Prior revisions: 1929 § 11567; 1919 § 10590; 1909 § 10403
